overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy exploring a stormy nighttime landscape, transitioning from rocky trails through bioluminescent grasslands to a streamside encounter with another character near ancient wreckage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail surrounded by scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding rocky path through a forested hillside at night

entered.detail: uneven stone trail winding through the terrain with patches of grass
deciduous trees with dark canopies silhouetted against the night sky
shrubs and undergrowth lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky forest trail at night, surrounded by scattered trees and low bushes. The overcast sky provides dim diffused light as the path winds through the natural terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view revealing storm clouds

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal stormy night sky with moon breaking through clouds

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while the camera pans up to survey the turbulent sky above

entered.detail: dark turbulent clouds covering the night sky with varying densities
pale moon visible through breaks in the cloud cover

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to showcase the dramatic stormy sky, revealing the moon through cloud breaks. The ground elements temporarily exit the frame as the view focuses on the atmospheric conditions above.

scene_state.functional_zone: meadow of tall bioluminescent grass alongside stream

events.description: transition from rocky terrain to field of tall orange grass with glowing fireflies

agents.ego_description: moving through waist-high orange grass with glowing bioluminescent particles floating around

entered.detail: waist-high grass with distinctive orange-red tint swaying in the wind
bioluminescent green lights floating among the grass blades
narrow waterway running parallel to the path reflecting moonlight

segments.scene_description: The character enters a meadow filled with tall orange grass illuminated by glowing fireflies. A stream runs parallel on the right side as the landscape opens into a more expansive natural area with distant pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: streamside path with ancient metal wreckage

events.description: slowing down as another character comes into view near dark wreckage ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the stream toward a figure standing near twisted metal wreckage

notable_agents.action: standing motionless near dark wreckage, facing the approaching player character

entered.detail: twisted ancient metal structure partially buried in the grass, possibly machine remains
dense coniferous trees shrouded in mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character follows the stream toward an area with ancient metal wreckage on the left. Another figure stands near the wreckage ahead, and the character slows while approaching. The stream runs closer to the path now, with a dense pine forest visible in the misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, stormy forest that gradually opens into a bioluminescent meadow and a riverside encounter. It begins with the character navigating a rocky forest trail under a diffused, overcast night sky. As the camera tilts upward to reveal the moon breaking through dramatic storm clouds, the view shifts away from the terrain to emphasize the atmospheric weather. The scene then expands as the character enters a wide meadow of tall orange grass illuminated by glowing fireflies, with a stream appearing on the right. Finally, the camera follows the water's edge toward ancient metal wreckage and a waiting figure, while a dense, misty pine forest looms in the distance.
